hyperedges.label: Prisma Data Hierarchy: Industry -> Property -> PropertyValue (cascade delete)
SKU Generation Pipeline: Industry + Properties + PropertyValues -> SKU string
Admin CRUD Pattern: Toolbar + Modal + Page + REST Router
Social Media Icons in Sprite Sheet

nodes.label: SKU Composition Pattern: segment codes joined by industry separator
nodes.rationale: Each property contributes a positional SKU segment (code or raw value). Segments are joined using the industry-level skuSeparator (e.g. '-'), enabling different industries to define their own SKU format without code changes.
nodes.norm_label: sku composition pattern: segment codes joined by industry separator

nodes.label: Manual vs Range Property Value Types
nodes.rationale: Properties of valueType='Manual' select from a predefined PropertyValue lookup table (with SKU codes), while valueType='Range' accept free numeric input validated against rangeMin/rangeMax. This supports both categorical attributes (e.g. Valve Type) and continuous attributes (e.g. custom sizes).
nodes.norm_label: manual vs range property value types
